items.title: Iran war economic shocks will last 'months', say Australia's PM
items.dek: Anthony Albanese used a rare TV address to tell Australians that the "months ahead may not be easy" amid the global effects of the war.
items.body: Anthony Albanese used a rare TV address to tell Australians that the "months ahead may not be easy" amid the global effects of the war.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israel intensifies Lebanon attacks and hits areas not in Hezbollah's control
items.dek: Attacks have continued, as Israel has announced its intention to control swathes of south Lebanon.
items.body: Attacks have continued, as Israel has announced its intention to control swathes of south Lebanon.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Russian military plane crash kills 29 in occupied Crimea
items.dek: Russian authorities say a technical malfunction caused the An-26 to crash into a cliff.
items.body: Russian authorities say a technical malfunction caused the An-26 to crash into a cliff.
items.author: IriLine Desk
